title: Don't post generated/AI-edited comments. HN is for conversation between humans.
author: usefulposter
aiHeadline: AI-generated comments banned from HN because they were too good at sounding human, apparently.

title: Create value for others and don’t worry about the returns
author: ppew
aiHeadline: Create value for others and don't worry about the returns—unless you're the one getting rich, then it's totally worth it.

title: Whistleblower claims ex-DOGE member says he took Social Security data to new job
author: raldi

title: Temporal: A nine-year journey to fix time in JavaScript
author: robpalmer
aiHeadline: JavaScript finally fixes time after nine years—because who needs accurate time tracking anyway?

title: Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web
author: mikece
aiHeadline: WebAssembly becomes a first-class language on the web—finally, it's getting the respect it deserves after all these years.
